title: UK Asset Resolution Annual Report & Accounts 2024-2025
body: "UK Asset Resolution Ltd (UKAR) is wholly owned by HM Treasury (HMT) whose shareholding is managed by UK Government Investments (UKGI). UKAR is responsible for meeting the contractual obligations and managing the remaining liabilities and other strategic matters arising out of the Government’s former ownership of NRAM Ltd, Bradford & Bingley, Mortgage Express and their respective subsidiaries. "
